rulings.Case Title: MARY LYONS VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, June 15, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT BRENNTAG SPECIALTIES, INC'S Motion To Quash For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction. Specially appearing defendant Brenntag Specialties, Inc.'s motion to quash for lack of personal jurisdiction is continued on the court's own motion to June 23, 2016. =(503/GLW)
